languages.text: "Если упрощать еще сильнее — Империум и есть смысл нашей жизни".
"To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."
languages.original_text: "Если упрощать еще сильнее — Империум и есть смысл нашей жизни".

traits.locale_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."
"To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."
"To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

languages.text: «En términos aún más sencillos: el Imperium es el sentido de nuestras vidas».
languages.original_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

traits.locale_text: «En términos aún más sencillos: el Imperium es el sentido de nuestras vidas».

languages.text: “说得再简单点，帝国就是我们生命的意义。”
languages.original_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

traits.locale_text: “说得再简单点，帝国就是我们生命的意义。”

languages.text: « Pour simplifier encore plus : le sens de notre vie, c'est l'Imperium. »
languages.original_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

traits.locale_text: « Pour simplifier encore plus : le sens de notre vie, c'est l'Imperium. »

languages.text: "Um es noch weiter zu vereinfachen ... das Imperium ist der Sinn unseres Lebens."
languages.original_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

traits.locale_text: "Um es noch weiter zu vereinfachen ... das Imperium ist der Sinn unseres Lebens."

languages.text: 「インペリウムは私たちの生きる意味なのです」。
languages.original_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

languages.text: "Daha da basitleştirmek gerekirse... Hayatımızın anlamı İmparatorluk aslında."
languages.original_text: "To simplify that even further — the Imperium is the meaning of our lives."

traits.locale_text: "Daha da basitleştirmek gerekirse... Hayatımızın anlamı İmparatorluk aslında."
